session.user:
Run the following command from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results:
make lint format ty
Report pass/fail status for each check and any error details.
session.assistant: I'll run the lint, format, and type checking commands from the repository root.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint, format, and ty checks

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 make: *** No rule to make target 'format'. Stop.
uv run ruff check All checks passed!
session.assistant: Let me check what make targets are available:
Let me check the Makefile to see what targets exist:
session.tool_result:
1→.PHONY: format-check lint prettier prettier-check ty upgrade-ty test py-fast-ci fast-ci all-ci md-check docs-check docs-validate docs-sync-check docs-fix clean publish fix reinstall-erk-tools docs docs-serve docs-deploy exec-reference-check mcp mcp-dev test-erk-mcp docs-v2-build docs-v2-serve 2→ 3→prettier: 4→ prettier --write '**/*.md' --ignore-path .gitignore 5→ 6→prettier-check: 7→ prettier --check '**/*.md' --ignore-path .gitignore 8→ 9→format-check: 10→ uv run ruff format --check 11→ 12→lint: 13→ uv run ruff check 14→ 15→fix: 16→ uv run ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes 17→ uv run ruff format 18→ prettier --write '**/*.md' --ignore-path .gitignore 19→ 20→ty: 21→ uv run ty check 22→ 23→upgrade-ty: 24→ uv remove ty --group dev && uv add --dev ty 25→ 26→# === Package-specific test targets === 27→ 28→test-erk-dev: 29→ cd packages/erk-dev && uv run pytest -n auto 30→
... [165 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant: Now I'll run the three checks separately since there's no "format" target - the correct target is "format-check":
session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed!
uv run ruff format --check 1684 files already formatted
uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
## Results Summary
All three checks **PASSED**:
1. **Lint** (`make lint`): PASSED - Command: `uv run ruff check` - Result: All checks passed!
2. **Format Check** (`make format-check`): PASSED - Command: `uv run ruff format --check` - Result: 1684 files already formatted
3. **Type Check** (`make ty`): PASSED - Command: `uv run ty check` - Result: All checks passed!
Note: The original command `make lint format ty` failed because there is no `format` target in the Makefile. The correct target is `format-check` (for checking) or `fix` (for fixing formatting issues).
